# 🎙️Voice  Search: The WordPress Feature You're Missing

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2025-06-28 13:30:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 892

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

As you may know, voice search is growing FAST.

According to an eMarketer forecast, over 160 million Americans
will use voice assistants by 2027.

The question is… has your website already been optimized for
voice search?

If not, you’ll have to.

Here's everything you need to know about voice search
optimization for WordPress! 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0.sja_Dzc8iA8lFRzKjx976Y7_IJTHxbPep5QKyV7BT3Q )

Read the article and let me know your thoughts by replying to
this email :)

Add Voice Search to Your Own WordPress Site
-------------------------------------------

Optimizing for voice search is only half the battle!

What if your visitors could actually use voice search directly on
your site?

Instead of typing their queries, imagine them simply speaking
into their device to find exactly what they need on your
website.

Learn how to implement voice search 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..uEJmIIwn4n0d5rGmZ_Ao1BDU-deU_DLpEKVGGF4zopI )
 on your WordPress site with a free plugin.

Let Us Build Your Voice-Ready WordPress Site
--------------------------------------------

designed WordPress site that's optimized for voice search from
day one?

Our expert design team creates stunning, high-performing websites
that incorporate all the latest features, including voice search
capabilities and SEO optimization.

You simply share your vision, and we handle everything from
